nasb.text: Yet it is I who taught Ephraim to walk, I took them in My arms; But they did not know that I healed them.

esv.text: Yet it was I who taught Ephraim to walk; I took them up by their arms, but they did not know that I healed them.

cnv.text: 然而是我教導以法蓮走路的； 我用雙臂抱他們， 他們卻不知道是我醫治了他們。

ccb.text: 是我教以法莲学步，张开双臂抱他们， 他们却不知道是我医治他们。
